---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve ClawZ
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 24.04]
- ClawZ version: [e.g. v0.1.0 (build 72)]
- OpenClaw version: [from Settings > About]

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what happened.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Logs**
Paste relevant logs from the Log Center page (if applicable).

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots.
